title: matricaria chamomilla subsp. pusilla
intro: Matricaria chamomilla subsp. pusilla, also known as dwarf chamomile, is a subspecies of the chamomile plant (Matricaria chamomilla) that is characterized by its smaller size and compact growth habit. The medicinal properties of Matricaria chamomilla subsp. pusilla are attributed to its high content of apigenin and other flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to calm the nervous system, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote relaxation, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for insomnia, digestive issues, and skin conditions. Matricaria chamomilla subsp. pusilla can be prepared into teas, tinctures, salves, and infusions, and is often used in aromatherapy and skincare products to promote relaxation and soothe skin irritations.
